purpose: Controlled real LLM run before full 118-item analysis.
selection_rules: include manual locator reviewed multiple_candidates items
include previous locator edge case item
include non-current-gap readiness/watchlist item when available

replacements.reason: The requirement pack stores the generic topic-instantiation boundary item as current_gap:GRI3:3-3_generic.

replacement_policy: If one ID is absent, replace it with the closest item of the same risk class and record the reason in run_summary.json.
